texto: Psychological abuse is.. the sustained, repetitive, inappropriate behavior which damages or substantially reduces the creative and developmental potential of crucially important mental faculties and mental processes of a child, including intelligence, memory, recognition, perception, attention, imagination, and moral development.
explicacao: Orientação direta de Kieran O'Hagan sobre temas ligados a familia. A afirmação “Psychological abuse is.. the sustained, repetitive, inappropriate behavior which damages or subst…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a familia, child-abuse, psychological-abuse, útil em momentos de psychological-abuse.
